highlights.text: Sydney (3N) → Port Douglas (2N) → Whitsundays (2N) romantic circuit
Private harbour sunset cruise with sparkling wine welcome
Great Barrier Reef private helicopter & sand cay snorkel
Whitehaven Beach & private candlelight island dinner

itinerary.title: Romantic Australia Honeymoon Sanctuary
itinerary.overview: Begin your lifelong love story amid the most dramatic and sun-drenched landscapes of the southern hemisphere with this signature TRAGUIN curated honeymoon retreat. Intimate harbour sunset cruises, private rainforest canopy walks, and isolated sapphire-water island escapes guarantee unforgettable memories. Includes private luxury harbour vessels, executive ground transits, skip-the-line VIP sanctuary admissions, and private dining terraces overlooking iconic Australian horizons with 24/7 concierge support.
itinerary.seo_title: AU-002 | Romantic Australia Honeymoon Sanctuary | TRAGUIN
itinerary.seo_description: Luxury 07 Nights / 08 Days Australia honeymoon (AU-002): Sydney harbour cruise, Daintree Rainforest, Great Barrier Reef helicopter flight, and Whitsunday Islands private escape.

days.title: Arrival in Sydney & Private Harbour Cruise
days.description: VIP airport transfer to harbour-view hotel. Evening private sunset cruise past Opera House and Harbour Bridge with sparkling wine welcome in suite.
activities: Sightseeing Included: VIP airport reception, private luxury vessel sunset harbor cruise
Honeymoon Highlight: Complimentary chilled Australian sparkling wine and rose petals in suite
Overnight Stay: Sydney Harbour (Ultra-Luxury Harbor-view Hotel)
Meals Included: Harbor Cruise Gourmet Welcome Dinner

days.title: Sydney Icons & Coastal Cliff Walks
days.description: Private Opera House tour and Bondi to Coogee coastal cliff walk. Rooftop harbour dinner.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Private Opera House guided tour, Bondi coastal cliff walk
Overnight Stay: Sydney Harbour (Ultra-Luxury Harbor-view Hotel)
Meals Included: International Breakfast & Casual Coastal Bistro Lunch

days.title: Fly to Cairns & Daintree Rainforest
days.description: Flight to Cairns and private transfer to Daintree Rainforest for guided canopy walk.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Private executive transit to Daintree Rainforest, guided canopy walk
Overnight Stay: Port Douglas / Daintree (Luxury Boutique Rainforest Retreat)
Meals Included: International Breakfast & Rainforest Gastronomy Dinner

days.title: Great Barrier Reef Helicopter Expedition
days.description: Private helicopter flight over the reef with sand cay landing and exclusive snorkeling session.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Private helicopter reef flight, private sand cay snorkeling session
Overnight Stay: Port Douglas / Daintree (Luxury Boutique Rainforest Retreat)
Meals Included: International Breakfast & Gourmet Reef Picnic Lunch

days.title: Whitsunday Islands Private Escape
days.description: Flight to Whitsundays. Afternoon on Whitehaven Beach with pristine silica sand and turquoise waters.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Private island transit, Whitehaven Beach exploration
Overnight Stay: Whitsunday Islands (Ultra-Luxury Private Island Resort)
Meals Included: International Breakfast & Island Beachside Dinner

days.title: Isolated Beach Gala & Stargazing
days.description: Private luxury vessel to secret beach picnic. Candlelight farewell dinner under southern stars with acoustic music.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Private luxury beach picnic, sunset stargazing gala
Honeymoon Finale: Candlelight farewell dinner with acoustic music performance
Overnight Stay: Whitsunday Islands (Ultra-Luxury Private Island Resort)
Meals Included: International Breakfast & Grand Honeymoon Finale Candlelight Dinner

days.title: Sunset Checkout & Sydney Departure Transit
days.description: Final Whitsunday breakfast. Private vessel and luxury van transfer to airport for Sydney transit night.
activities: Transfers: Private island boat and luxury van departure transit, luggage assistance
Overnight Stay: Sydney Harbour (Premium Luxury Hotel near Airport)
Meals Included: International Buffet Breakfast

days.title: Farewell Australia
days.description: Final luxury breakfast before private departure transfer.
activities: Transfers: Private luxury van departure transfer
Meals Included: International Buffet Breakfast

hotels.name: Pullman Quay Grand Sydney Harbour / similar

inclusions.text: 07 Nights in ultra-luxury harbor, rainforest, and private island suites
Complimentary chilled sparkling wine, fresh fruits, and roses on arrival
Private luxury vessels, executive ground vehicles, and helicopter flight transits
Private harbour sunset cruise and Great Barrier Reef helicopter expedition
Secluded island candlelight farewell dinner with acoustic music
VIP fast-track skip-the-line entries and 24/7 honeymoon concierge support
International flight tickets and entry visa processing fees
Personal expenses, hotel laundry, room service, and mini-bar billing
Tipping, porterage fees, or optional sightseeing not specified in the flow
